race.comment: BESKAR (1) stunned everyone when he scored in the Darby Munro two back then proved it was no fluke when he showed great courage to hang on and win the South Pacific over 1400m at Randwick last start. Handles all going and 1200m is fine off a four-week break. Sure to run another big race. NEPO BABY (10) was seven weeks between runs when beaten just a long neck in the PJ Bell over this trip at Randwick last time. Kept fresh again which is the key. Yet to miss the frame in five runs and from an inside gate she should keep that record intact. BEADMAN (2) was beaten fair and square by BESKAR when they clashed over 1300m two back. Found the Arrowfield too tough last start. Recent trial winner who has the class to win if at his best. MOTORSPORTS (12) won the Group 3 Blue Sapphire over this distance in the Spring. Just missed at Caulfield last time and should be cherry ripe for this. SUNRAYS (11) is a swimmer with a decent first-up record so keep her in mind.
